problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
